name: zhaoyang-front
desc: Japanese anime style. A 28-year-old Chinese man, thin build, messy black hair, dark circles under eyes, wearing a black hoodie. Front view, upper body portrait. Dark office background with blue monitor glow.

name: zhaoyang-side
desc: Japanese anime style. A 28-year-old Chinese man, thin build, messy black hair, dark circles under eyes, wearing a black hoodie. Side profile view, upper body portrait. Dark office background with blue monitor glow.

name: office-night
desc: Japanese anime style. A dark startup office at night. Only light comes from computer monitors glowing blue-white. Cluttered desk with takeout boxes, coffee cups, scattered papers. City night view through window. No people.
